title: Focus Point Self Study Library
description: Premium self-study library providing a completely silent, air-conditioned environment with high-speed WiFi. Perfect for UPSC, SSC, Banking, and CA aspirants.

contact.address: 2nd Floor, Sharma Complex, Main Market, Haldwani

rules: Maintain strict silence inside the reading halls.
Mobile phones must be on silent mode at all times.
Eating inside the reading area is strictly prohibited.
Do not reserve seats; seating is strictly on a first-come, first-serve basis unless a designated seat is booked.
The management is not responsible for the loss of personal belongings.

seo.metaTitle: Focus Point Self Study Library | Best Reading Room in Haldwani
seo.metaDescription: Looking for the best self-study library in Haldwani? Get AC rooms, high-speed WiFi, ergonomic chairs, and a silent environment starting at just ₹800/month.
